steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The student needs to specify the ORDER—the chronological sequence—in which different government entities received authority to regulate airline safety.

steps.title: Match the choice to the goal
steps.content:
Choice A lays out the transfer sequence (Commerce Department → CAA in 1938 → FAA in 1958), establishing the chronological order the student requested.

The other three either misrepresent the facts (B), lack the specificity of sequencing (C), or tell only a partial story (D).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
